# IsItSahih

> IsItSahih is a free Islamic claims verification tool. Users submit Islamic
> statements or questions; the tool searches the Quran and authentic Sahih Hadith
> via semantic vector search, then AI renders a verdict (True / False / Uncertain)
> based solely on the retrieved references — never inventing citations.

## What this site does

IsItSahih answers questions of the form "Is [Islamic claim] authentic?" by
searching the Quran and six authentic hadith collections (Sahih al-Bukhari,
Sahih Muslim, Sunan Abu Dawood, Sunan an-Nasa'i, Sunan at-Tirmidhi, Sunan Ibn
Majah) via Kalimat semantic search, then using Gemini AI to render a verdict
of True, False, or Uncertain based solely on the retrieved references.

## Citable content

Each share page at https://isitsahih.app/share/{uuid} is a permanent, immutable
Q&A record containing:
- The original claim or question
- A verdict (True / False / Uncertain) with an explanation paragraph
- Verbatim Arabic text and English translations of supporting Quran verses or Hadith
- Source citation: book name, hadith grade (sahih / hasan)

## Languages

English and Bangla (Bengali). Arabic text is displayed verbatim for all sources.

## Limitations

IsItSahih is an educational reference tool — not a fatwa platform. Verdicts are
based on AI analysis of retrieved primary sources and may not reflect scholarly
consensus. Users are directed to consult qualified Islamic scholars for personal
religious rulings.

## Sources

- The Holy Quran
- Sahih al-Bukhari, Sahih Muslim, Sunan Abu Dawood, Sunan an-Nasa'i,
  Sunan at-Tirmidhi, Sunan Ibn Majah
- Powered by Kalimat.dev semantic search API

## Contact

isitsahih@gmail.com
